description: dev-workflows plugin hooks — completion notification, git/context injection on workflow prompts, test-run notification, and dynatrace-docs frontmatter reminder.

_comments.PostToolUse_matcher: Claude Code supports a 'matcher' field (e.g. matcher: 'Bash' or 'Edit|Write') to restrict PostToolUse hooks to specific tools. Copilot CLI does not support matchers — both PostToolUse scripts fire on every tool use. Each script must be fast and exit 0 quickly for irrelevant invocations: test-notify.sh returns unless the command is a test runner; changelog-owners-reminder.sh returns unless the edited file is a dynatrace-docs .md content page.
